meaning: n.智利(南美洲西南部的一个国家,首都是圣地亚哥Santiago)
examples: Chile is the world's largest producer of copper.
It is a long time since he has visited his native Chile.
Conservationists in Chile are concerned over the effect of commercial exploitation of forests.
Founded in 1928, Coeur has operations in Argentina, Bolivia, Chile, Australia and Nevada, but nothing on this scale.
The Pascua Lama project is located in the Andes Mountains, between Chile and Argentina.
